name: 05 - New GitHub Issue → Notion Task + Slack

text.text: {{ $('Code - Parse Issue Data').item.json.type === 'Bug' ? '🐛' : $('Code - Parse Issue Data').item.json.type === 'Feature' ? '✨' : '📋' }} New {{ $('Code - Parse Issue Data').item.json.type }} #{{ $('Code - Parse Issue Data').item.json.issueNumber }}

*{{ $('Code - Parse Issue Data').item.json.issueTitle }}*

meta.description: Listens for new GitHub issue webhook events, parses labels into priority/type, creates a structured Notion database page, and notifies the dev Slack channel with direct links to both.
prerequisites: GitHub webhook configured on repo (Settings → Webhooks → Issues events)
Notion database with properties: Status (select), Priority (select), Type (select), GitHub Issue (url), Repository (text), Labels (text), Assignees (text), Reporter (text), Milestone (text)
Slack Bot Token with chat:write scope

testingScenario.happy_path: Create GitHub issue with 'bug' label → Notion page created, Slack notified

issue.title: Login page crashes on mobile Safari
issue.body:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open app on iOS Safari
2. Click Login
3. App crashes

**Expected:** Login form appears
**Actual:** White screen crash
